tasks.label: adb-reverse-8080-all
tasks.command: $devices = (adb devices | Select-String '\tdevice$' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\t')[0].Trim() } | Where-Object { $_ }); if (-not $devices) { throw 'No adb device connected.' }; foreach ($d in $devices) { adb -s "$d" reverse tcp:8080 tcp:8080; adb -s "$d" reverse --list }

tasks.label: adb-reverse-remove-8080-all
tasks.command: $devices = (adb devices | Select-String '\tdevice$' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\t')[0].Trim() } | Where-Object { $_ }); if (-not $devices) { throw 'No adb device connected.' }; foreach ($d in $devices) { $rules = adb -s "$d" reverse --list; if ($rules -match 'tcp:8080\s+tcp:8080') { adb -s "$d" reverse --remove tcp:8080 } }
